allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.host.neynar.app/v1/deploy -F files=@/tmp/clanker-tips.tar.gz -F projectName=clanker-tips -F framework=hono -F 'env={"SNAP_PUBLIC_BASE_URL":"https://clanker-tips.host.neynar.app"}' -F 'description=Initial deploy: clanker-tips snap v0.1')
